buttons.primary: bg-[#0EA5E9] text-white rounded-full border-4 border-[#0284C7] shadow-[0_6px_0_#0284C7] active:translate-y-[6px] active:shadow-none px-8 py-4 text-2xl font-bold cursor-pointer
buttons.success: bg-[#22C55E] text-white rounded-full border-4 border-[#16A34A] shadow-[0_6px_0_#16A34A] active:translate-y-[6px] active:shadow-none px-8 py-4 text-2xl font-bold cursor-pointer
buttons.back: bg-[#F59E0B] text-white rounded-full border-4 border-[#D97706] shadow-[0_6px_0_#D97706] active:translate-y-[6px] active:shadow-none px-6 py-3 text-xl font-bold flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer

components.avatars: w-32 h-32 md:w-40 md:h-40 rounded-full border-4 border-white shadow-lg object-cover bg-[#FEFCE8]

motion.feedback: Use react-confetti on marking a workshop as done

home.layout: grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 xl:grid-cols-6 gap-6 md:gap-8
home.instructions: Display a large grid of children's names. The cards should be huge, touch-friendly, using the 'cards' style. Include an avatar image on each card using provided avatar URLs or simple CSS shapes. Add a subtle 'Admin' text link or lock icon at the very bottom or top right.

child_workshops.instructions: Prominent 'Return to Home' button. List workshops in massive cards. Each card must have a massive Validation toggle. When validated, card background turns light green (#DCFCE7), shows a checkmark, and triggers a visual feedback (like confetti).

admin.instructions: Simple password entry screen. Admin dashboard with two main features: Add/Remove Children, Add/Remove Workshops. Plus a view to see the weekly tracking (who has done what). Use Shadcn UI for forms, keeping inputs large and readable.

instructions_to_main_agent: You have .js and .jsx files, not .tsx files. Write React components using standard JS/JSX syntax.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all standard UI icons.
Install and use 'react-confetti' for celebrating task completion to give positive visual feedback to the children.
Keep touch targets massively large (minimum 80px high/wide, big text) because children will use this on an interactive whiteboard.
Avoid standard web UI like small checkboxes. Use the chunky Neo-brutalist Tailwind rules in components.cards.
Do NOT use double-taps, drag-and-drop, or complex swipe gestures. Simple single taps only.
Import Fredoka and Nunito fonts from Google Fonts via CSS. Apply Fredoka to large names and headings.
Ensure ALL interactive elements and key information displays have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='child-card-john', data-testid='validate-btn').
Keep the app state simple but persistent (using the provided backend structure). Tracking history is permanent.
